acceptance_criteria: Shared integration harness centralizes feature sandbox, ledger seeding, and route helpers for driver-flow tests
quality_guards: Reconcile and retry guard test verifies drift detection resolution and lock idempotency/contension behavior
Integration tests no longer duplicate bootstrap setup logic

test_runs.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/speckit_implement_gate.py validate-task-evidence --task-kind module --tests-passed pass --smoke-exit 0 --state-safety pass --transaction-integrity pass --async-safety pass --observability pass --json
